issue.summary: Company admin can export skills taxonomy as CSV from Skills page

content.text: As a company admin, I want to download our skills taxonomy as a CSV file so I can share it with HR or import it into external tools.
On /company/skills, an Export (or Download CSV) action is visible to users with MANAGE_SKILLS permission.
Clicking Export triggers GET /skills/export-csv and downloads a CSV file with column headers: category, mainDiscipline, secondaryDiscipline (or equivalent).
Talent users and unauthenticated users cannot access the export endpoint.
Export shows a success toast or browser download; errors show a user-visible message (not a silent failure).

comments.author: Product Owner
comments.body: Use the same CSV format as the skills import template. Empty taxonomy should still download headers-only CSV.

comments.author: Engineer
comments.body: Merged to staging. API route is GET /skills/export-csv. Frontend hook: useExportSkillsTaxonomy. Please verify on staging with qa-company account.
